base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of small_mario_jump — a character (playable) from 1985 super mario bros. Single jump-pose frame — one arm raised up, legs tucked. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Single jump-pose frame — one arm raised up, legs tucked; used for both upward and falling trajectory
